title: tagetes lunulata
intro: Tagetes lunulata, also known as Mexican marigold, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family, native to Mexico and Central America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Tagetes lunulata include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
